title: Supply of Office Furniture for Regional Offices
description: Supply and delivery of office furniture including desks, chairs, filing cabinets, and conference tables for regional offices in Regions 1, 7, 8, and 9.

title: Construction of Community Center - Mahaica
description: Construction of a 5,000 sq ft community center in Mahaica, Region 5, including all civil works, electrical, and plumbing installations.

title: IT Equipment and Software Licenses
description: Supply of computers, printers, networking equipment, and Microsoft Office licenses for ministry headquarters and regional offices.

title: Consultancy - Regional Development Plans
description: Consultancy services for preparing comprehensive development plans for Regions 2, 3, and 4, including stakeholder consultations and environmental assessments.

title: Vehicle Maintenance Services
description: Annual maintenance contract for ministry's vehicle fleet including routine servicing, repairs, and parts supply.

title: Supply of Garbage Collection Trucks
description: Supply of 10 garbage collection trucks (compactor type) for distribution to NDCs in Regions 3, 4, and 6.

title: Road Rehabilitation - Better Hope Access Road
description: Rehabilitation of 2.5km access road in Better Hope including asphaltic concrete overlay, drainage improvements, and road markings.

title: Training Services - Financial Management
description: Provision of financial management training for 200 NDC officers across all regions, including training materials and certification.

title: Security Services for Ministry Buildings
description: 24-hour security services for ministry headquarters and three regional offices for a period of two years.

title: Supply of Water Pumps for Flood-Prone Areas
description: Emergency procurement of 20 high-capacity water pumps for distribution to flood-prone NDCs in coastal regions.
